beta0_reference.note: UNCONTROLLED — different prompts and cluster parameters per service

beta1.hold_reason: Not critical path. Main blocker is Q3 (TJB author provenance). Even CONVERGE yields only AI_CONSENSUS_CANDIDATE, not PHYSICAL_CONSTANT. Execute only if Q3 unanswered by ~2026-07-12 or on explicit approval.

status_implications.CONVERGE: β upgrades to AI_CONSENSUS_CANDIDATE — controlled prompting resolves ambiguity
status_implications.DIVERGE: confirms BETA-0 finding — ambiguity is intrinsic to underdetermined fitting; β remain DO_NOT_USE; Q3 critical
status_implications.PARTIAL_D_ONLY: β_d robust under controlled prompting; β_q remains ambiguous
status_implications.PARTIAL_Q_ONLY: β_q robust under controlled prompting; β_d remains ambiguous

next_step: Query each AI service with data/beta1_responses/prompt_v1.md. Record β_d and β_q in {service}_response.csv. Then re-run this script.
safety_notes: NOT modeling H_MULT(z) — β values are inputs to fitting, not predictive parameters
NOT validating or refuting MULTING — this is a convergence test of AI responses
NOT claiming β values are canonical — all remain AI_MEDIATED_CANDIDATE or DO_NOT_USE
